title: Excalibur | Macaw's Roofs Support
description: Macaw's Roofs mod retextured and adapted and made to run alongside the Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew.
body:
![mcwroofs](https://i.postimg.cc/2y94Khf5/MCWRoofs-Title-Presentation-1.png)

This is a support pack: [Macaw's Roofs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-roofs) mod retextured and adapted and made to run alongside the awesome [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack by Maffhew.

__**Features**__

*   Some roof models have been reworked to make Excalibur's textures fit better on roofs (see the gallery for examples comparison).
*   Items have been retextured to match the style/theme of the Excalibur resource pack
*   Gutters Retextured
*   Outer Awnings remodeled

__**Installation**__

Ingame

\-> Click "Options…"

\-> Click "Resource Packs…"

\-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

\-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur\_Mcw-Roofs\_v\*\*.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

\-> Move the Excalibur\_Mcw-Roofs resource pack from the left column to the right

\-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

\-> Select "Done"

__**Showcase**__

Here is a list of roofs type remapped :

*   Red concrete
*   mudbrick
*   Blue/Light Blue concrete
*   Lime/Cyan concrete
*   Prismarine brick
*   Stonebrick
*   Red Sandstone

![Showcase](https://i.postimg.cc/xjgZG4B0/MCWRoofs-Presentation-3.png)

__**Credits**__

\-Maffhew: Author of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack

\-sketch\_macaw: Author of [Macaw's Roofs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-roofs) Mod
